summary: v0 what-if scenario estimate for decision support; compare directions, not precise effects
not_validated_warning: This is a what-if scenario estimate, not a validated causal simulation or control command.

expected_state_direction: EC issue may dilute only if drainage is adequate
potential_benefits: water-stress risk may decrease during high VPD or radiation
potential_risks: over-wet substrate risk if recent irrigation is ignored

evidence_references.title: Sensor-controlled fertigation management for higher yield and quality in greenhouse hydroponic strawberries; Solar-radiation and substrate-moisture fertigation study for Seolhyang strawberry
evidence_references.note: Local markdown: 01_s13580-025-00677-z.md links Rad/VPD/LAI to transpiration; 08_N0090300416.md reports solar-radiation and substrate-moisture fertigation including 60% moisture and 100/150/250 J/cm2 treatments.

assumptions: directional v0 estimate based on literature/manual rules
local calibration and human review are required
